MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-09-2023 IN 206, PLAINTIFF ROY EIKLEBERRY'S MOTION FOR ORDER ADVANCING TRIAL DATE OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE TOLL CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 583.310'S FIVE YEAR LIMITATION. MEGAN JOHNSON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. DAVIS REILLY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. AFTER A MEET & CONFER IN THE HALLWAY, COUNSEL DETERMINED AND STATED THAT THE FIVE-YEAR LIMITATION OF CCP SECTION 583.310 IS TOLLED UNTIL FEBRUARY 29, 2024. THE COURT THEREFORE GRANTED THE MOTION TO TOLL CCP SECTION 583.310'S FIVE YEAR LIMITATION TO FEBRUARY 29, 2024, BUT DID NOT ADVANCE THE TRIAL DATE AS COUNSEL AGREED TO MAINTAIN THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE OF 10/30/23 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Off Calendar

Motion For Relief From Default And To Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Stanley Riddell; 415-787-0576; specially appearing on behalf of defendants Warren Pennington and Sowchun Ho.
Megan Johnson; Wolford Wayne LLP; 415-649-6203; appearing on behalf of plaintiff Roy Eikleberry.

Plaintiff's supplemental declaration in support of plaintiff's opposition to defendants' motion is discussed, and the court notes that it did not receive courtesy copies. Mr. Riddell states that he has seen the declaration, and the amount of costs and attorney fees stated in the declaration is discussed. Defendants' counsel argues that the fees are excessive, and states that Mr. Bornstein had offered to pay $5,000 in fees if plaintiff's counsel would stipulate to set aside default and proceed with litigation. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted. Plaintiff shall be awarded $1,467.44 in costs and $2,500 in attorney fees.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Apr-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Case Summary In Support Of Application For Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendants Warren B. Pennington and Sowchun Ho.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:00 a.m.

Megan Johnson, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Roy Eikleberry, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Johnson and Mr. Eikleberry appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Warren B. Pennington or Sowchun Ho.

Plaintiffs' Complaint for Violations of the San Francisco's Rent Board Ordinance, Constructive Eviction and Wrongful Eviction was filed on May 18, 2018.
Orders granting plaintiffs' ex parte applications for Publication of Summons were filed September 13, 2019.
Proof of Service of Summons via Publication as to defendants Warren B. Pennington and Sowchun Ho was filed on December 19, 2019.
Orders granting plaintiffs' ex parte applications for Publication of Statement of Damages was filed on March 17, 2021.
Two separate Statements of Damages were filed with the Clerk's Office on June 1, 2021.
Defaults as to defendants Warren B. Pennington & Sowchun Ho were entered on June 1, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 28, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Roy Eikleberry, and against the defaulted defendants Warren B. Pennington and Sowchun Ho, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $117,710.00.
Attorney Fees - $44,560.00.
Costs - $8,054.71.
Punitive Damages - $50,000.00.

Total - $220,324.71.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 11:37 a.m.
